description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rocker/tidyverse Docker image. Include a before_script that runs Rscript -e 'install.packages(c(\"xaringan\", \"DT\", \"anonymizer\"))'. Define a pages job (default test stage) that runs the following script commands in order: Rscript -e 'rmarkdown::render(\"index.Rmd\", output_file = \"index.html\", output_format = \"all\")', mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, mv .public public. The job should publish the public/ directory as a pages artifact and only run on the master branch.
